Question: What is the mean expenditure for hospitalized individuals receiving either chemotherapy or surgical treatment?
SQL Query: SELECT AVG(Cost) AS Cost FROM (SELECT Cost AS Cost FROM PatientTreatmentRecords WHERE PatientType = "Inpatient" AND TreatmentType = "Chemotherapy" UNION ALL SELECT Cost AS Cost FROM PatientTreatmentRecords WHERE PatientType = "Inpatient" AND TreatmentType = "Surgery");

Question: What is the mean medication compliance percentage when considering patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease who have a high level of adherence, those with heart disease at medium and low adherence levels, and individuals with diabetes maintaining high adherence?
SQL Query: SELECT AVG(AdherenceRate) AS AdherenceRate FROM (SELECT AdherenceRate AS AdherenceRate FROM MedicationAdherence WHERE ChronicCondition = "COPD" AND AdherenceLevel = "High" UNION ALL SELECT AdherenceRate AS AdherenceRate FROM MedicationAdherence WHERE ChronicCondition = "Heart Disease" AND AdherenceLevel = "Medium" UNION ALL SELECT AdherenceRate AS AdherenceRate FROM MedicationAdherence WHERE ChronicCondition = "Diabetes" AND AdherenceLevel = "High" UNION ALL SELECT AdherenceRate AS AdherenceRate FROM MedicationAdherence WHERE ChronicCondition = "Heart Disease" AND AdherenceLevel = "Low");
